verse_text: And do not be called teachers; for One is your Teacher, the Christ.

links.context: Paul soothes the soreness of his rebuke by reminding them of his fatherhood (see the note on [[MAT.23:9]], [[MAT.23:10]]). As in a family, so in the Church, maturing children need parental guidance. The apostle to the Gentiles--thus to most Christians--writes imitate me because he imitates Christ (11:1).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
